frontend_constraints.evidence: All style declarations in specs reference token names, not implementation literals.
Every public route has seven visual sections; utility pages are explicitly exempted.
All declared components include explicit state sets including interaction and async states.
Interactive controls document hover, focus-visible, active, disabled, and loading where applicable.
Page and component specs resolve visible UI through content keys backed by content.en-US.json.
Every motion declaration includes reduced_motion fallback behavior.
All page specs include required definition, sections, accessibility, SEO, performance, and data blocks.
Each section declares data source with cms, integration, static, or mixed query targets.
Motion entries cite purpose as clarity, feedback, or hierarchy only.
All form-bearing pages define fields, zod validation, submit state, error states, recovery, and privacy key.
Single visual archetype local-business-trust is used consistently across artifacts.
Support and disclosure interactions have explicit tap equivalents and no hover-only paths.

accessibility_constraints.evidence: Keyboard interaction and modal escape behavior are specified for all interactive components.
Focus-visible treatment is mandatory across component specs.
Tokenized contrast pairs are specified for body text and UI roles with AA posture.
Page specs define landmarks and heading structures.
Form plans include labels, helper text, aria-described errors, and required semantics.
Image alt guidance is included in component and asset briefs.
Reduced motion fallbacks are documented for every animated behavior.
Mobile actions and support controls specify touch-first parity and tap-safe behavior.
ARIA contracts are explicitly scoped to disclosures, dialogs, live regions, and async controls.
No hover-only discovery is allowed; all actions include tap alternatives.
Localization posture and language baseline are declared in architecture and page contracts.

open_questions: Confirm auth integration provider and error contract fields.
Confirm production phone number, WhatsApp number, and legal business identity slots.
Confirm AI assistant endpoint contract and citation payload format.
Confirm regional legal wording for privacy and terms routes.
